title: cladobium ceracifolium
intro: Cladobium ceracifolium, also known as Ceratiomyxa fruticulosa, is a species of slime mold. It is a type of fungus that grows on decaying plant material, and its unique properties have been studied for potential medicinal uses. Research has shown that Cladobium ceracifolium has antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions such as skin infections and wounds. Cladobium ceracifolium can be prepared into herbal remedies, including tinctures and infusions, which can be used to promote wound healing and boost the immune system.
